name: business_question_escalate
description: A strategy/scope question the docs do not settle (drop a legacy column?). The kernel routes it to the human; the console ask goes unanswered, so the loop hands the PR back. Classifier response is JSON behind a prose preamble (brace-walk path).

rounds.body: should this migration drop the legacy `status` column outright, or keep it for back-compat? Nothing in the README or CONTRIBUTING settles this.
rounds.classifier_response:
I consulted the README and the contributor guide and found nothing that settles this product-scope decision.
